work-orders.Description: Annual PM — flow sensor calibration, battery check, alarm test, filter replacement
work-orders.Resolution: All tests passed. Replaced HEPA filter and battery.

work-orders.Description: Annual PM — flow sensor calibration, battery check, alarm test
Semi-annual PM — flow accuracy test, occlusion pressure, alarm verification
work-orders.Resolution: Flow accuracy within spec. Cleaned chassis.

work-orders.Description: Annual PM — SpO2 accuracy, NIBP verification, ECG calibration, display check
Quarterly PM — energy output test, paddle/pad check, battery capacity, ECG verification
work-orders.Resolution: Energy output verified. Battery at 92% capacity.

work-orders.Description: Quarterly PM — cycle validation, seal integrity, cassette check, biological indicator test
work-orders.Resolution: All cycles validated. Replaced door seal gasket.

work-orders.Description: Annual PM — full system calibration, arm alignment, camera check, instrument test
Annual PM — radiation output test, image quality, mechanical safety, fluoroscopy check
work-orders.Resolution: Image quality excellent. Radiation output within limits.

work-orders.Description: Monthly PM — reagent lines flush, sensor calibration, QC verification
Annual PM — lead test, frequency response, common mode rejection
Quarterly PM — energy output test, paddle/pad check, battery capacity
Semi-annual PM — patient circuit test, O2 cell, pressure calibration
Annual PM — image quality, probe check, DICOM connectivity
work-orders.Resolution: All probes functional. Image quality excellent.

work-orders.Description: Annual PM — transducer test, thermal safety, display calibration
Quarterly PM — temperature validation, pressure test, drain check
Flow sensor showing intermittent errors. Ventilator alarming during patient ventilation.
SpO2 module reading erratically. Replaced cable but issue persists.
Sample arm positioning error. Failing to aspirate correctly.
Output power inconsistent. Surgeon reported poor cutting performance.
work-orders.Resolution: Replaced power output board. Verified at all settings.

work-orders.Description: NIBP cuff failing to inflate properly. Multiple manual attempts needed.
work-orders.Resolution: Replaced NIBP pump assembly. Verified accuracy.

work-orders.Description: Printer paper feed jamming intermittently.
FAILED self-test. Energy delivery below spec. Unit pulled from service.
work-orders.Resolution: Capacitor failure. Unit beyond economical repair — recommended disposal.

work-orders.Description: Sudden power failure during patient ventilation. Backup battery did not engage.
work-orders.Resolution: Battery connector corroded. Replaced battery and connector. Full test passed.

work-orders.Description: Screen went black during surgery. Audible alarms still functional.
work-orders.Resolution: Display panel failure. Replaced LCD. Full system test passed.

work-orders.Description: Air-in-line alarm triggered during infusion. Sensor may be malfunctioning.

recalls.Description: Sigma Spectrum infusion pumps may deliver unintended bolus due to software defect in firmware v8.1. Risk of over-infusion.
recalls.Action Required: Remove affected units from service. Update firmware to v8.2 or replace.

recalls.Description: IntelliVue monitors may display incorrect SpO2 values when using certain third-party sensors.
recalls.Action Required: Replace all third-party SpO2 sensors with OEM Philips sensors. Verify readings post-swap.

recalls.Description: LIFEPAK 15 units manufactured 2020-2021 may have battery contacts that corrode, causing intermittent power loss.
recalls.Action Required: Inspect battery contacts. If corrosion present, send to Medtronic for repair.

recalls.Description: i-STAT 1 cartridge lot 2024-A may produce elevated troponin values. Affects cardiac marker testing.
recalls.Action Required: Quarantine cartridge lot 2024-A. Retest any patients tested with affected lot.

recalls.Description: Harmonic Ace+ tip may fracture under high-torque conditions. Advisory to inspect tips before use.
recalls.Action Required: Visual inspection protocol added to pre-surgical checklist.

inspections.Notes: One critical finding: ventilator PM documentation gap in ICU. Two minor: equipment labeling inconsistencies.
Minor finding: sterilizer biological indicator log had one missed entry. Corrected on-site.
Two findings: ECG overdue for calibration (EQ-0034), infusion pump recall unit still in area (EQ-0008).
Full compliance. All lab equipment maintenance records current and complete.
Advisory: consider upgrading patient monitor alarm management system. Current system functional but aging.
Annual insurance inspection. Focus on high-value assets and life support equipment.

disposals.Notes: Trade-in credit applied to OEC 9900 purchase.
Capacitor failure. Unit destroyed per NFPA 99 requirements.
Donated to Partners in Health. Tax deduction documentation filed.
Awaiting finance review for asset write-off.
Vendor offering credit toward newer model. Pickup scheduled.
FDA Class I recall. Vendor replacement program available.
Beyond useful life. E-waste recycling vendor contacted.
Sample arm repair cost exceeds 60% of replacement value.

activity-log.Details: Flow sensor errors. Pulled for corrective maintenance.
Emergency WO created for Evita V800 flow sensor issue.
FDA Class I recall registered for Sigma Spectrum pumps.
Unit flagged per FDA recall Z-0342-2025.
Servo-u flow readings off by 3%. Adjusted and verified.
CMS survey completed. Score 92. One critical finding.
Annual PM completed on PB980 ventilator.
FDA Class II recall for Philips monitor SpO2 sensors.
Annual da Vinci Xi PM scheduled for next month.
Draeger Medical contract expired. Renewal pending.
BV Endura C-Arm retired. Traded in for OEC 9900.
ELI 280 ECG out of tolerance. Requires recalibration.
PM on hold — waiting for replacement O2 cell from vendor.
